headlines.description: Bayern Munich came from a goal down to beat Borussia Monchengladbach 3-1 in the Bundesliga on Saturday and stay on the heels of leaders Bayer Leverkusen.
headlines.shortLinkText: Kane scores as Bayern beat Monchengladbach

video.headline: Bayern come from behind to beat Gladbach

tracking.trackingName: SOC_One-Play (Bayern come from behind to beat Gladbach) 2024/02/03 ESHEET

headlines.description: Bayer Leverkusen's Nathan Tella scored in each half to steer the Bundesliga leaders to a 2-0 victory at Darmstadt 98 on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Leverkusen stay top with 2-0 win at Darmstadt

video.headline: Nathan Tella scores again to double Leverkusen's lead

tracking.trackingName: SOC_One-Play (Nathan Tella scores again to double Leverkusen's lead) 2024/02/03 ESHEET
